purpose: Reusable case library for NERO Design Team. Store lightweight references, not full client materials.
rules: Do not store client secrets, customer-sensitive evidence, API keys, or private contact/payment identifiers.
Store case summaries, design decisions, token usage, template names, scores, and QA outcomes.
Use cases as reference patterns, not as factual evidence for new deliverables.
When a case is based on a real external artifact, record source boundary and licensing status.
For GitHub references, prefer lightweight snapshots over full repository reads; snapshots store summaries, paths, license notes, and image URLs only.
